- To the right (cols 30+) there's white space (WWWWWW)

- The red horizontal bar is at rows 39-41
- Below the red bar, there's white space at rows 42-44
- The target blue area is at rows 49-55, cols 43-49

- Row 8: BBbbbbbBBBBBBBBBBBBBWWWWWW - block at cols 26-30, white at cols 40+
- Row 9-11: ...RRRBBWWWWWW - red strip at cols 35-37, then black, then white
- Row 14-18: WBBBBBBBWWWWWWWBRBWWWWWWWW - white at cols 26-34, then B, R, B, then white
- Row 26-38: WWWWWWWWWWWWWWWBRBWWWWWWWW - white at cols 26-38, then B, R, B, then white
- Row 39: BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBRBWWWWWWWW - black at cols 26-38, then B, R, B, then white
- Row 40: RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRBWWWWWWWW - red at cols 26-38, then B, then white
- Row 41: BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBWWWWWWWW - black at cols 26-38, then white
- Row 42+: WWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWW - white everywhere
So the red vertical strip is at cols 38-40 (B, R, B pattern). The white area to the right of this strip (cols 42+) extends from rows 8-44.
The target is at rows 49-55, cols 43-49. To reach it, I need to:
1. Get to the white area on the right side (cols 42+)
2. Move DOWN past the red horizontal bar
3. Reach the target
From the current position (rows 8-12, cols 26-30), I need to go RIGHT to enter the white area on the right side. Let me try RIGHT.
